title: Lily's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Baby Lily experiences different emotions throughout her day, each represented by beautiful colors that swirl around her as she feels happy, sad, and angry.

pages.text: This is Lily. She feels many things every day. Her feelings have colors!

illustration.description: A young girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes standing in the center with swirls of different colored emotions gently floating around her - yellow happiness, blue sadness, and red anger in soft abstract patterns
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is happy, she sees bright yellow! Like sunshine all around her. Happy feels warm and bright.

illustration.description: A smiling girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes dancing joyfully as golden yellow sunshine rays and cheerful swirls surround her against a bright yellow background with sparkles
illustration.alt: Happy Lily surrounded by yellow sunshine

pages.text: Sometimes Lily feels sad. Then she sees soft blue, like gentle rain falling down. Sad feels quiet and cool.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting quietly with a gentle frown as soft blue raindrops and misty blue clouds float around her in a soothing blue atmosphere
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain around her

pages.text: When Lily gets angry, she sees red swirls spinning fast! Angry feels hot and strong like fire.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with crossed arms and a frown as bold red swirls and zigzag patterns whirl energetically around her against a red background

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Yellow happy, blue sad, red angry - they're all part of Lily. Colors help her understand how she feels inside.

illustration.description: A peaceful girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting calmly as all three emotion colors - yellow, blue, and red - blend harmoniously in gentle, balanced swirls around her
illustration.alt: Lily with all her colorful feelings in harmony

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Lily see when she's happy?
questions.explanation: When Lily is happy, she sees bright yellow like sunshine!

questions.question: What does sad feel like for Lily?
questions.explanation: Sad feels quiet and cool like gentle blue rain.

questions.question: Are all of Lily's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All feelings are okay - happy, sad, and angry are all part of Lily.
